name: Cute Puppy
subject: animals
prompt: a fluffy sitting puppy with big round eyes and long floppy ears, a wagging tail, one front paw lifted up, wearing a little collar with a round name tag

name: Baby Elephant
subject: animals
prompt: a chubby baby elephant standing and smiling, big floppy ears, a curled-up trunk holding a single small flower, round friendly eyes, little toenails and a tiny tail

name: Friendly Lion
subject: animals
prompt: a friendly cartoon lion sitting upright with a big fluffy curly mane framing its face, a happy smile, rounded paws, and a tufted tail curled around beside it

name: Sleepy Sloth
subject: animals
prompt: a cute sleepy sloth hanging upside down from a thick tree branch by its long curved claws, a slow contented smile, half-closed droopy eyes, shaggy fur, a couple of leaves dangling nearby

name: Happy Fox
subject: animals
prompt: a cheerful sitting fox with large pointed ears, a long bushy tail wrapped around its paws, a slender pointed snout with a happy smile, and bright alert eyes

name: Cuddly Koala
subject: animals
prompt: a round cuddly koala hugging a eucalyptus tree trunk, big fluffy round ears, a large oval nose, sleepy gentle eyes, and small clawed paws gripping the bark, a few leaves above

name: Curious Raccoon
subject: animals
prompt: a curious raccoon sitting up on its hind legs, a bushy ringed tail curled behind it, a black mask marking across its eyes, small rounded ears, dexterous little front paws held up as if inspecting something, bright alert eyes

name: Little Hedgehog
subject: animals
prompt: a tiny round hedgehog with a back full of short spiky quills, a small pointed nose, little round eyes, four stubby legs, sniffing at a single fallen leaf and an acorn on the ground

name: Spotted Fawn
subject: animals
prompt: a delicate baby deer fawn standing on slender legs in a grassy meadow, rows of soft spots across its back, big gentle eyes, tall ears, a tiny tail, with a few wildflowers and tall grass around its hooves

name: Playful Otter
subject: animals
prompt: a playful otter floating on its back on the water surface, paws holding a smooth round pebble on its tummy, a whiskered smiling face, sleek body, and gentle water ripples and a couple of bubbles around it

name: Hopping Kangaroo
subject: animals
prompt: a friendly kangaroo standing on strong back legs and a thick tail, a small joey peeking out of the pouch on its belly, tall pointed ears, short front arms, and a gentle smiling face

name: Owl Portrait
subject: animals
prompt: a close-up front-facing portrait of a wise owl from the chest up, two very large round eyes, a small curved beak, feathery tufts above the ears, detailed layered chest feathers, perched and looking straight ahead
